description: Immutable metric definitions. Every dashboard value must derive from this spec.

metrics.name: knowledge_reuse_rate
metrics.label: Knowledge Reuse Rate
metrics.sql: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN decision = 'MEMORY_HIT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN step = 'memory_lookup' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)
metrics.interpretation: ↑ over time = system depends more on stored knowledge

metrics.name: llm_calls_per_pr
metrics.label: LLM Calls per PR
metrics.sql: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN decision = 'LLM_GENERATED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN decision = 'PR_CREATED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)
metrics.interpretation: ↓ over time = knowledge replaces LLM calls

metrics.name: merge_rate
metrics.label: Merge Rate
metrics.sql: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN outcome = 'merged' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)

metrics.name: cost_per_accepted_pr
metrics.label: Cost per Accepted PR
metrics.interpretation: ↓ over time = knowledge reduces operational cost

metrics.name: median_pr_latency_ms
metrics.label: Median PR Latency (ms)
metrics.definition: median duration from first decision to PR_CREATED per event
metrics.sql: event-level: SUM(duration_ms) per event_id where PR_CREATED exists, then median across events
metrics.interpretation: ↓ or stable = knowledge doesn't slow pipeline

metrics.name: decision_coverage_pct
metrics.label: Decision Coverage
metrics.definition: events resolved by knowledge vs total events
metrics.sql: COUNT(DISTINCT event_id with MEMORY_HIT) / COUNT(DISTINCT event_id with memory_lookup)

metrics.name: truth_calibration_count
metrics.label: Truth Events Collected
metrics.interpretation: absolute count; minimum 50-100 before drawing conclusions

principles: All metrics derive from decision_logs or truth_events — no secondary counters
Any new metric must be added to this contract before appearing in any dashboard
v2 changes must reference this contract and note what changed
